overview: MemoryAI is an AI-powered second brain and memory assistant. Study smarter with adaptive spaced repetition, gamified achievements, a stunning glass-morphism dashboard, and deep analytics to track every memory you build.
features: Gamification with badges, XP, and level-up animations
Glassmorphism dashboard with animated stat widgets
Real backend integration replacing all mock data
Advanced analytics: learning velocity and forgetting patterns
Streak celebration animations and milestone confetti
Study sessions with 3D card flip and keyboard shortcuts
Dark and light theme with OKLCH color system
